first_paragraph: [Snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_Winter_Olympics "Snowboarding at the Winter Olympics") at the [2026 Winter Olympics](/wiki/2026_Winter_Olympics "2026 Winter Olympics") was held at the [Livigno Snow Park](/wiki/Livigno_Snow_Park "Livigno Snow Park") in [Valtellina](/wiki/Valtellina "Valtellina"), [Italy](/wiki/Italy "Italy") between 5 and 18 February 2026. A total of 11 snowboarding events were held.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1)

[Snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_Winter_Olympics "Snowboarding at the Winter Olympics") at the [2026 Winter Olympics](/wiki/2026_Winter_Olympics "2026 Winter Olympics") was held at the [Livigno Snow Park](/wiki/Livigno_Snow_Park "Livigno Snow Park") in [Valtellina](/wiki/Valtellina "Valtellina"), [Italy](/wiki/Italy "Italy") between 5 and 18 February 2026. A total of 11 snowboarding events were held.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1)

## Qualification

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Qualification")]

Main article: [Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Qualification](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Qualification "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Qualification")

## Competition schedule

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Competition schedule")]

The following is the competition schedule for all eleven events.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1) Sessions that included the event finals are shown in **bold**.

All times are ([UTC+1](/wiki/Central_European_Time "Central European Time")).

| Date | Time | Event |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 5 February | 19:30 | [Men's big air](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_big_air "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's big air") |
| 7 February | 19:30 | **[Men's big air](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_big_air "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's big air")** |
| 8 February | 09:30 | **[Women's](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_parallel_giant_slalom "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's parallel giant slalom")** and **[men's parallel giant slalom](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_parallel_giant_slalom "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's parallel giant slalom")** |
| 19:30 | [Women's big air](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_big_air "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's big air") |
| 9 February | 19:30 | **[Women's big air](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_big_air "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's big air")** |
| 11 February | 10:30 | [Women's](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_halfpipe "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's halfpipe") and [men's halfpipe](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_halfpipe "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's halfpipe") |
| 12 February | 10:00 | **[Men's snowboard cross](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_snowboard_cross "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's snowboard cross")** |
| 19:30 | **[Women's halfpipe](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_halfpipe "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's halfpipe")** |
| 13 February | 10:00 | **[Women's snowboard cross](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_snowboard_cross "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's snowboard cross")** |
| 19:30 | **[Men's halfpipe](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_halfpipe "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's halfpipe")** |
| 15 February | 10:15 | [Men's slopestyle](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_slopestyle "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's slopestyle") |
| 13:45 | **[Mixed team snowboard cross](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Mixed_team_snowboard_cross "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Mixed team snowboard cross")** |
| 14:35 | [Women's slopestyle](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_slopestyle "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's slopestyle") |
| 18 February | 12:30 | **[Men's slopestyle](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_slopestyle "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Men's slopestyle")** |
| 14:30 | **[Women's slopestyle](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2026_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_slopestyle "Snowboarding at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Women's slopestyle")** |
